selected_important_turn.text: What about I have all the food, and you can have everything else? I would think that seems pretty fair.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is a major zero-sum, take-it-all proposal that crystallizes a competitive frame: you claim all of your top-priority item (food) and leave the opponent to ask for compensation. It strongly shaped the subsequent bargaining (opponent pushed back insisting on at least one food).
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Framing "all the food" as "fair" closed off creative trades and provoked resistance. It was rigid and lacked acknowledgement of the opponent's stated minimum need (at least one food), so it increased conflict risk and reduced perceived fairness.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Avoid all-or-nothing language; instead acknowledge the opponent's minimum and open with a trade offer that explicitly compensates them (e.g., propose you take 2 foods while offering a clear, generous package of water/firewood). Ask a clarifying question about their priorities before asserting fairness.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by enabling tradeoffs rather than hard division)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (less likely to make the other party defensive)

value2reason.Low: I don't plan on making much campfires but they would be good to have.
value2reason.Medium: I need water so my friends don't get dehydrated.
value2reason.High: I need enough food to feed all my friends.

value2reason.Low: Always nice to have a fire at the end of the day.
value2reason.Medium: Hiking and camping makes me thirsty.
value2reason.High: Always need good food for a successful trip.

dialogue.text: Hello, great to see a fellow camper.  Planing on doing any hikes.  My family and mother-in-law are down getting some new trail maps.  We are looking forward to the long camping weekend.  Our bad luck was the airline loss two of our bags that had our food and water.  So i am hoping to get some more.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hello! Thats terrible that the airline lost your bags! I'm planning on have a large group of friends with me so we need lots of snacks with us. We are scared of fires so we don't want to make campfires.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Well maybe we can work something out between us.  Our food and water was in the bags they loss so I really need those.  Do you think you could make do with 1 food and some water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I really need 2 foods. I can do with 1 water or if you are in a giving mood then maybe I can have 2 waters? 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Looks like we both really need the food.  If you get 2 food I would need 1 food, 2 water and 3 firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Since you will get all the fire would do you think I could have 2 foods and 2 waters. You would get 1 food, 1 water, and 3 firewood. 🙂 You seem like you are a great outdoor person that I would think you would be able to catch some fish to cook with the firewood. 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: No that does work well for me.  If I only have 1 food I need 2 waters and the firewood to make up for the loss of food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: What about I have all the food, and you can have everything else? I would think that seems pretty fair.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand you need at least one food package. How about I offer you 1 food, 2 water, and 1 firewood? That way we both get what we need, and I can still secure the rest for my friends.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate the offer, but I need more food. How about I take 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood? That aligns better with my priorities, and I can share the rest with you.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Let's see. If I take 2 food, you take 1, and we split the remaining 2 food, 3 water, and 3 firewood equally, would that work? It ensures you get your minimum food and I can still meet my friends' needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That sounds fair. Let me confirm: you take 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood, and I take the remaining 1 food, 2 water, and 2 firewood. If that works, we can agree and wrap this up.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed! I take 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. You take 1 food, 2 water, and 2 firewood. All packages are split fairly, and we can head out.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
